These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2019. 2. They shall come into force on 01 S1 April, 2019. 3. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Regulations, 2010,- (a) in regulation 4, after the sixth proviso, the following proviso shall be inserted, namely: - "Provided also that the transitional period may, after the completion of the extended transition period till 31.03.2019, be further extended up to 31.1 2.201 9"; (b) in regulation 5, after the fifth proviso, the following proviso shall be inserted, namely: - "Provided also that the determination of the petroleum and petroleum product pipeline transportation tariff under this regulation shall be bench marked against the goods tariff table of the railways as applicable on the date of the coming into force of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2019 and if the goods tariff table of the railways is revised during the further extended period of transition, the Board may consider the benchmarking of the petroleum and petroleum products transportation tariff against such revision." VANDANA SHARMA, Secy. rAdvt-III/4IExty.l20119) Foot Note: The Principal regulations were notified vide G.S.R. 987(E), dated 20-12-2010 and subsequently amended vide notifications no. F.No. PNGRBIM(C)/62/2012, dated 13.12.2012, F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2014, dated 16.12.2014, F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62J2014, dated 15.12.2016, F. No. PNGRBIM(C)/62/2014, dated 15.12.2017 and PNGRB/M(C)/62/20l8, dated 18.12.2018.
